Shalee's Animation  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetEncS03L014Anim

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 85 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 10
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Animates a weapon and shield to attack your enemies. Consumes a tiny dagger when cast.

Reagents

  • Tiny Dagger x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Shalee's Animation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Shalee's Animation
ClassLevel
ENC14
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (18)
  • Sold By (2)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
pet info
QuoteReply
# May 26 2011 at 6:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1635121598750
9 posts
Ok so this pet is the upgrade from animation enchanters recieved at level 9. I personally did not have enough money to buy all of the pets from this guy at 7 so i found myself running back to HHK at 14. This was made much easier by the fact that at 14 enchanters get the spell invis to undead. ItU makes the run through kith much easier and now getting to HHK is fairly simple.

The pet itself appears to be level 16 he can hit for a max of 20, which is two points better than the previous animation. His kicks hit for a max of 16 which is a nice 6 point upgrade. Bash is still 1 point as all previous animations have been. He doubles quite frequently. I have not tried out dual wield and i prolly won't as i like the bash interrupting spell casters.

Rowninx
▲ Page top
Tarn Visilin in HighKeep
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2008 at 6:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592310666403
78 posts
He has many lvls of Enchanter Pet spells.
/loc 65.95, -223.64, 3.75

A room not too far in past the "Established 2097" sign, main floor, on the left side. He is hiding in around the corner, standing next to Justin Ryhmes who has bard songs.

Tarn Visilin in HHK has all the chanter pet spells. 1st floor, 1st room to the left, in the back.
▲ Page top
Thought the question was...
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2006 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591834606460
5 posts
Never mind, I found it my self. For those of you still needing this spell its is in HighKeep from vender Justin right next to a vender who sells Bard songs named Tarn. If your maps are updated, they are both marked on your map. Both are on the first floor.

Edited, Dec 4th 2006 1:18pm by lordnitewalker
▲ Page top
Hello?
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2006 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591834606460
5 posts
Thought the question was where can you find the spell.. ie. city? merchant? Daggers you can buy anyplace and are easy to find. Usually by a vender near the enchanter guildmaster in your home town if nothing else. If the spell is in Highkeep, how bout posting the merchants name.

# Mar 13 2003 at 7:21 AM Rating: Decent

The Daggers are sold in the Enchanter Guild in Freeport. Woman in corner, she also sells the 'Tome of Endless Enchantment' wish I had a nightmare finding!

Tiny daggers are also sold at the enchanter guild in Felwithe. Vendor is in the 1st room you enter, with the trainer in the center.

Edited, Thu Feb 6 22:56:59 2003

RE: Ummmm Ingredients....
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2003 at 5:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362244519
14 posts
I know that these daggers are sold at the 3rd Inn in Eastern Commans....just follow the road out of freeport around and it should lead you to it, but i also think they are sold at a vendor in the Academy of Arcane Arts in freeport as well (not 100% sure though). They are cheap and stackable so load up =)
